message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "Front End" as FE
participant "Back End" as BE

FE::> Client : Visit park page
FE::> Client : Present reviews

BE::> Website Park Page : Send get reviews request
BE::> Website Park Page : ReviewsModel

Website Park Page::> GetParkReviewsActivity : Get reviews
GetParkReviewsActivity::> Reviews : Reviews item

BE::> Reviews : Reviews item

BE::> Website Park Page : Present reviews
Website Park Page::> Client : Present reviews

note right of BE
  GetParkReviewsActivity
end note

note right of BE
  Reviews
end note

note right of BE
  Reviews
end note
